hero.title: Jura Champi
hero.subtitle: Fresh mushroom producer in the Jura region

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Jura Champi was born in 2018 from Laurence and Aurélien's passion for mushrooms and the lands of the Jura. After years in conventional agriculture, they decided to specialize in quality mushroom cultivation, favoring environmentally friendly methods.
story.paragraph2: Based in the heart of the Jura massif, Laurence and Aurélien grow their mushrooms in natural caves that offer ideal humidity and temperature. This traditional approach, combined with modern know-how, allows them to offer exceptional products year-round.
story.paragraph3: Today, Jura Champi supplies the best restaurants in the region, school canteens committed to offering local products, and individuals through our delivery service. Our commitment: fresh mushrooms, locally grown, delivered with a smile.
story.learnMore: Discover our story and where to find us →

clients.title: Who are our mushrooms for?
clients.restaurantsDesc: Fresh, quality products to enhance your dishes
clients.canteensDesc: Regular supplies for local, healthy meals
clients.individualsDesc: Home delivery for your everyday recipes

productsPreview.title: Our Mushrooms
productsPreview.subtitle: Discover our selection of fresh mushrooms grown in the Jura

products.title: Our Mushrooms
products.subtitle: Fresh mushrooms grown with passion in the Jura

shiitake.name: Shiitake
shiitake.description: Shiitake, originally from Asia, is prized for its firm flesh and pronounced umami flavor. Perfect for stir-fries, soups and Asian dishes.

pleurote.name: Oyster Mushroom
pleurote.description: The oyster mushroom offers a delicate texture and mild flavor. Ideal pan-fried, in sauce or in risottos.

champignonParis.name: Button Mushroom
champignonParis.description: The timeless classic. Versatile and delicious, it adapts to all cuisines and can be enjoyed raw or cooked.

maitake.name: Maitake
maitake.description: Also called 'hen of the woods', maitake has a unique texture and woody notes. Excellent in fricassée or as a side dish.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question, an order? Don't hesitate to contact us.

findUs.title: Find us
findUs.subtitle: Our story, our premises and where to find us

history.title: Our story
history.paragraph1: Jura Champi was born in 2018 from Laurence and Aurélien's passion for mushrooms and the lands of the Jura. After years in conventional agriculture, they specialized in quality mushroom cultivation, with respect for the environment.
history.paragraph2: Based in the heart of the Jura massif, Laurence and Aurélien grow their mushrooms in natural caves offering ideal humidity and temperature. A traditional approach combined with modern know-how for exceptional products year-round.

premises.title: Our premises
premises.description: Our farm is located in Saint-Claude, in the heart of the Haut-Jura. The natural caves that house our crops are the secret to our mushrooms' quality: constant freshness, natural humidity, and that unique terroir that makes the Jura famous.
premises.visit: By appointment for professionals and the curious!

whereToFind.title: Where to find us?
whereToFind.wordplay: Besides finding us on your plate… you can also find us here!

online.title: Online & by phone
online.description: Order or ask your questions by email or phone. We're happy to respond and organize deliveries according to your needs.

markets.title: At Jura markets
markets.description: Come say hello and taste our mushrooms at local producer markets. A chance to chat, discover our latest products and leave with a full basket!
markets.list: Lons-le-Saunier, Arbois, Saint-Claude, Foncine-le-Haut, Morez, Champagnole… and many more depending on the season.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.intro: In accordance with the provisions of articles 6-III and 19 of Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on Confidence in the Digital Economy (L.C.E.N.), these legal notices apply to the jurachampi.fr website.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Jura Champi is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its website. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data.

cgv.title: Terms and conditions of sale
cgv.intro: These general terms and conditions of sale govern the sale of fresh mushrooms by Jura Champi to professionals and individuals.
